inputs.text: Maine kal raat se bahut tezi se bukhar chadha hai, sar dard bhi bahut ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Acute onset of high fever and severe headache

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Common symptoms of viral fever include high fever and headache

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Dengue is less likely without other symptoms like retro-orbital pain

inputs.text: Ab aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, bukhar abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Chikungunya can cause joint pain, but retro-orbital pain is more specific to Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely with these specific symptoms

inputs.text: Aaj subah se bukhar kam ho gaya hai, lal daane nikal aaye hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The appearance of rash and bleeding gums after fever reduction is characteristic of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever does not typically cause a rash or bleeding gums

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria does not typically cause a rash or bleeding gums

inputs.text: Main abhi bhi bahut kamzor mehsoos kar rahi hoon, dehydrated mehsoos ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The patient's symptoms and signs are consistent with Dengue, and the patient is now in the recovery phase

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the presence of rash and bleeding gums

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the presence of rash and bleeding gums
